executives.name: Adam Spice
executives.background: Mr. Spice has served as the Chief Financial Officer since May 2018. From January 2011 to May 2018, Mr. Spice served as Vice President and Chief Financial Officer at MaxLinear, Inc., a provider of radio frequency, analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits. From October 2009 to November 2010, Mr. Spice was the Chief Financial Officer of SiTime Corporation, a MEMS-based semiconductor company.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
